title: callista terminalis
intro: Callista terminalis, also known as the Butterfly Pea or Asian Pigeonwings, is a tropical flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its flowers and leaves, which are used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its high content of antioxidants and flavonoids. The health benefits of Callista terminalis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, infusions, and capsules, which are traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and are also gaining popularity as a dietary supplement in modern times.
